descriptions.hero: Rewards, badges, capstones, and certificates appear here as you finish each subject path.
descriptions.badges: Earned for finishing subject milestones and final rewards.
descriptions.certificates: Official completions you can open or download.
descriptions.noBadges: No badges yet. Finish a subject path to unlock your first badge.
descriptions.noRewards: No standalone rewards are waiting right now.
descriptions.noCertificates: No certificates yet. Keep going — your unlocked certificates will appear here.
descriptions.noMoreComing: Nothing is waiting in the “more coming soon” state right now.
descriptions.completedPublished: You completed everything published so far.
descriptions.noEnrollments: Enroll in a subject to start tracking progress and earning rewards, badges, and certificates.
descriptions.rewardFallback: You unlocked the final reward for this subject.
